hero_description.name: hero_description
hero_description.default: 'FIMAC (Financial Investment Management Advice Consultants) is a premier global consultancy specializing in the sale and acquisition of hospitality properties.'

vision_text.name: vision_text
vision_text.default: 'To be the world''s most trusted and influential platform for hospitality property transactions, redefining the standards of excellence and becoming the first choice for professionals seeking to buy or list hospitality assets.'

mission_text.name: mission_text
mission_text.default: 'Our mission is to empower hospitality business owners, buyers, and brokers by providing a seamless, secure, and expert-led platform that facilitates successful transactions.'
